login.title: Log in to your account
login.subtitle: Get exclusive benefits on your first order after signing up!
login.socialLabel: Sign in with your social accounts

verification.title: Verification Required
verification.messagePrefix: To ensure your security, we'll send a verification code to your email
verification.messageSuffix: . The code will expire in 5 minutes.
verification.resendPrefix: Didn't receive any? Please check your spam or

validation.credentialsMismatch: Email address & password does not match.

register.title: Become a Member
register.subtitle: Kickstart your journey by earning 2 points upon registering an account.
register.passwordHint: Password must be at least 6 characters and include an uppercase letter, number, or special character.
register.promoOptIn: Sign me up for email to receive promos, exclusive offers and marketing materials.

validation.mustAgree: You must agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

profile.toast: All set! We're excited to have you—let's get started.

profile.title: Profile Details
profile.text: Manage your personal information, contact details, and preferences in your profile.

settings.title: Account Settings
settings.text: Manage your account preferences, including promotion and discount alerts, as well as your review settings.

settings.title: Account Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account preferences.
settings.promotionsDesc: Receive emails about savings, new items, promotions & more.
settings.reviewsDesc: Receive emails everytime your order gets completed, as well as published reviews.
settings.confirmationsDesc: Receive emails regarding final proof, design changes and payment proof.
settings.unitDesc: Choose your preferred/default unit of measurement.
settings.billingDesc: Use shipping address as your default billing address.
